creator: freebsd-bugzilla@umpquanet.com
text:
I neglected to provide the pkg info output:

jimsdesk : 12:09:16 /root# pkg info net-snmp
net-snmp-5.9.4_6,1
Name           : net-snmp
Version        : 5.9.4_6,1
Installed on   : Mon Oct 28 15:12:53 2024 PDT
Origin         : net-mgmt/net-snmp
Architecture   : FreeBSD:14:amd64
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : net-mgmt
Licenses       : BSD3CLAUSE
Maintainer     : zi@FreeBSD.org
WWW            : http://net-snmp.sourceforge.net/
Comment        : Extendable SNMP implementation
Options        :
        AX_DISABLE_TRAP: off
        AX_SOCKONLY    : off
        DOCS           : on
        DUMMY          : on
        MFD_REWRITES   : off
        MYSQL          : off
        NEWSYSLOG      : on
        NOLIBPKG       : off
        PERL           : on
        PERL_EMBEDDED  : on
        PYTHON         : off
        SCTP           : off
        SMUX           : on
        TKMIB          : off
        TLS            : off
        UNPRIVILEGED   : off
Shared Libs required:
        libpkg.so.4
        libperl.so.5.36
Shared Libs provided:
        libnetsnmptrapd.so.40
        libnetsnmpmibs.so.40
        libnetsnmphelpers.so.40
        libnetsnmpagent.so.40
        libnetsnmp.so.40
Annotations    :
        FreeBSD_version: 1401000
        build_timestamp: 2024-10-01T01:22:49+0000
        built_by       : poudriere-git-3.4.2
        cpe            : cpe:2.3:a:net-snmp:net-snmp:5.9.4:::::freebsd14:x64:6
        port_checkout_unclean: no
        port_git_hash  : 9364edfdf0
        ports_top_checkout_unclean: no
        ports_top_git_hash: 1f84c1fae6
        repo_type      : binary
        repository     : FreeBSD
Flat size      : 12.2MiB
Description    :
This is Net-SNMP (previously known as "ucd-snmp").

Various tools relating to the Simple Network Management Protocol including:

    An extensible agent
    An SNMP library
    tools to request or set information from SNMP agents
    tools to generate and handle SNMP traps
    a version of the Unix 'netstat' command using SNMP
    a graphical Perl/Tk/SNMP based mib browser
